transcript.text:
It's so red, out of the tteokbokkis...
I had thus far, it's the reddest!!
(The reddest tteokbokki Tzuyang ever had...) The color is seriously so unique
(Look-alike mother and son make this special tteokbokki!)
(We have them too, even special sides!)
(How will the DARK red tteokbokki taste...?)
(A taste that surprises her?!) This is very.....
(And so, she ate it all up...)
(A surprising scene) You ate it all
(Here is today's mukbang that surprises both parties!) Happy New Year!
(Where is this place that looks so nostalgic?)
Hello, everyone
Right now, I'm at Ahyeon Market
And I'm here to eat tteokbokki today,
which I noticed was completely red
(I'm curious...of that red thing...) How can it be that red?

I thought it was so cool, so I came here
(Let's go) Alright, let's quickly head inside
It's right in front of Ahyeon Market
("Mapo Street Food" Ahyeon Market, Seoul)
(Met the owner first outside LOL) Hello, are you the owner?!
(The owner recognized Tzuyang...!)
- Really!? You know me? - Yes, yes
Really?!
You're pretty
Really?! Hehe, thank you
(Tzuyang's real name = "Park" Jung-won) Everyone with the last name Park is pretty
You're Park, right?!
(Of course LOL) Yes
How'd you find your way here?
Oh, I was surfing the Web
and the tteokbokki was so red

- (Haha, you've come to the right place) - It was so red and I thought it was cool, so I came
Is it spicy...?
(Thankfully, it's moderately spicy!) No, it's not spicy
- It's not? - Yes
- It's red but not spicy? - It's enjoyable
The menu board...
(Various dishes of "Mapo Street Food") It sounds delicious
What is "Green Onion Oil Shin Ramyun"? That sounds good
(How much will she order...)
I'll have assorted tempura,
spicy green onion oil Shin Ramyun, one of each kimbap,
soondae*, fish cakes *Korean sausage
And for tteokbokki...
I'd like 5 servings
(It's making me dizzy...)
(The secret to the super red tteokbokki will be revealed now!)

(Oh, the sauce will be revealed a little later, of course!)
(Oh my, I love this color on you...)
(Kimbap)
(Soondae)
(Now, it's time for the son to shine!)
(It's not store-bought, it's handmade tempura!)
(Assorted tempura)
(Displayed quickly in front of Tzuyang) Thank you!
(Ramyun that will get soggy will be presented last!)
(Spicy green onion oil Shin Ramyun)
Thank you
(Even the ramyun is out!)
(She eats a lot...lol)
Oh, I heard the tempura here is really good...
Should I eat the handmade tempura first?
Is this menbosha*? It's a first eating menbosha at a street food eatery *Fried shrimp toast

(Menbosha with ham and cheese instead of shrimp!) There's cheese and delicious things inside
I think I know this taste
- Bon appétit! - Enjoy your food
I need to eat the tempura first!
- We made it ourselves here - Really?
The tempura batter is really good
The batter itself is really good...!
The tempura batter is so great
and inside, there's this sweet garlic sauce
("Mapo Street Food" menbosha with that genuine fried toast!) It feels like jam, and it's different than regular menbosha
(Next is the long-awaited tteokbokki!) I'll have the tteokbokki first since it'll get cold
(Can you see...This fierce red...) It's so red, it's the reddest tteokbokki I've ever eaten!
How can it be so red?
(She slowly takes in the flavor...)
It doesn't taste like anything I've ever eaten...!
How should I say this?

(Why can't you talk...?!) I don't know how to explain the taste
(Not spicy at all) First, it's not spicy at all!
It looks like it'll be really spicy
but seriously, it's not
(Next is the ramyun!) The ramyun too!
It's gonna get soggy, I need to eat it quickly
(Shin Ramyun with dark soup that has green onion oil) Green onion oil ramyun!
The ramyun's really good!
(What's up with this ramyun...?) It's much more delicious than regular ramyun
I love the scent
Wow, it's so good!
(Inhaling mode... ON...) Since the noodles will get soggy, I'll get rid of this fast
Maybe it's because it's green onion oil ramyun,
but it really feels like there's oil in there
Oh, it's hot...
It's delicious!

(Returns to the tteokbokki!) The tteokbokki tastes like...
A little sweet
I can't sense it on the second or third bite,
but if I go back to this after eating something else,
it's like strawberry jam...???
It has that kind of sweet flavor
- The secret is beets - You aged beets?
- The sweet flavor in here is from the beets? - Yes
That's really unique...!
We didn't even add starch syrup
(Sorry I didn't recognize you, beets...! LOL) Since I know it now, it's starting to make sense
The way it looks
(End Boss of heavy food...) doesn't look that healthy, honestly
But they made it in a healthy way
They said they didn't add any MSG
And it's like healthy tteokbokki made from Jeju's beets!

Next is kimbap!
The kimbap is unique too!
You know those chewy braised lotus roots?
It feels like burdock
(The texture of burdock is one of a kind!) The texture's like very chewy braised lotus roots!
Handmade seaweed roll tempura
(Look at how full the inside is...) They made it so full
(Full)
Oh, it's really good
(Dip it into the tteokbokki sauce!)
(Next is fish cake!)
(Next is plump soondae!)
I'll dip the soondae in salt
(Soft "Mapo Street Food" soondae!) The glass noodles inside are softer than that of regular soondae
And the fish cake is so fluffy, should I say?
The tempura and soondae

(This place has great side dishes...!) and other sides are very unique and delicious
(Crunchy)
The tempura is really good!
(The owner suddenly comes over!)
I'll heat this up
Oh, thank you
(She's smiling like Joker)
The ingredients of the kimbap is unique too
Braised lotus roots... The sticky ones!
(The reheated tteokbokki is here!) Thank you
Warm ones taste good!
But seriously, same with the color,
I keep getting a feeling like it's strawberry jam...
Is this how beets taste?
(Street food restaurant run by two people) I heard the mother and son run this place
You can see their picture over there!

(Look-alike mother and son...)
There are only two tables here
(The space is full of warmth...!) It's very cramped inside with two tables, so it has that cozy vibe
May I ask how old you are...?
I'm 81 years old!
(Looks so young) You look so healthy and well!
Isn't it tiring for you?
(Her hands are proof of the years she had worked...!)
You ate it all!
She even looked really relaxed....
(I'll eat the rest even more deliciously) Thank you
- Thank you for coming to this cramped place... - No, I should be thankful
The sweet potato is really sweet
The menbosha is really unique
Rather than menbosha,
this feels like they fried the Taiwanese...

sweet sandwich...?
(And so, she kept on inhaling food...)
The fish cake is so good
(Where did all that food go...)
(Ahyeon Market "Mapo Street Food" ALL CLEARED!)
(Did a storm just pass by...?) That was so good!
I really enjoyed the meal!
I had a great meal once again!
- Happy New Year - Happy New Year to you too!
- Oh! Happy New Year! - Thank you
(Dear subscribers, I hope you are healthy and happy always...!) Thank you, Happy New Year
